title: Luffy Protects His Crew
description: Luffy transforms the final match into a ridiculous but serious fight, taking on Foxy in front of both crews.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this scene focuses on Luffy, Foxy, Nami, Usopp, Zoro. Luffy transforms the final match into a ridiculous but serious fight, taking on Foxy in front of both crews.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Eh? Why was the bomb talking?

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: Because I'm the real foxy head!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Luffy, punch him in the stomach!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Oh? You can see them, usopp?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: All the bombs hit head on >>>!!!

summary: Luffy transforms the final match into a ridiculous but serious fight, taking on Foxy in front of both crews.
